# Import Fixtures

These fixture files are synthetic but format-realistic templates for parser and
regression tests.

They are based on:

- official provider format documentation for 23andMe and AncestryDNA
- the `snps` project documentation and example dataset conventions:
  - https://github.com/apriha/snps
  - https://snps.readthedocs.io/en/stable/readme.html

They are intentionally small and safe to version in the repository. They are
not real personal DNA exports.
